mapper.sql: r.recommend_id, r.fund_id, fi.fund_code, fi.fund_name, fi.fund_type, fi.risk_level, c.company_name, pm.return_rate AS return_1y, pm.max_drawdown AS max_drawdown, r.total_score_snapshot, r.recommend_level, r.reason, r.risk_warning, r.suitable_user, r.tags, r.display_order, r.created_time

(SELECT pm.* FROM fund_performance_metric pm INNER JOIN ( SELECT fund_id, MAX(stat_date) AS max_date FROM fund_performance_metric WHERE period_code = '1Y' GROUP BY fund_id ) m ON m.fund_id = pm.fund_id AND m.max_date = pm.stat_date WHERE pm.period_code = '1Y')
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM ai_recommend_item r INNER JOIN ai_recommend_record rec ON rec.recommend_id = r.recommend_id INNER JOIN fund_info fi ON fi.fund_id = r.fund_id LEFT JOIN fund_company c ON c.company_id = fi.company_id LEFT JOIN pm ON pm.fund_id = fi.fund_id WHERE rec.status = 'SUCCESS'
AND rec.user_id = #{userId}
AND r.fund_id = #{fundId} ORDER BY rec.created_time DESC LIMIT 1
